creator: yun.zhou@dell.com
text:
Currently the link to `requests` python lib homepage under
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/main/www/py-requests/pkg-descr

shown as:
https://docs.python-requests.org/en/master/

As a step towards addressing inclusive language, we can replace it by
https://docs.python-requests.org/en/latest/
